input: Mehr als 235 000 Personen aus dem Asylbereich sind zurzeit in der Schweiz

runtimePreflightBeforeSubmission.limitation: The Web internal runner route auth was not independently probed before this first HJ75 submission.

failure.cause: API accepted the job, then RunnerClient received HTTP 401 from Web /api/internal/run-job because the local Web runtime did not accept the configured runner key.
evidence: Web log recorded POST /api/internal/run-job 401 during the failed job trigger window.
Persisted API job record has gitCommitHash/createdGitCommitHash but executedWebGitCommitHash, promptContentHash, resultJson, and reportMarkdown are null.
No adminDiagnostics.sourceChainAttribution exists because analyzer execution never started.

postFailureRuntimeAuthRepair.action: Runtime restart hygiene only; no source behavior change.
postFailureRuntimeAuthRepair.runnerKeyPreflight: /api/internal/run-job with configured runner key now returns 400 Missing jobId instead of 401 Unauthorized.
postFailureRuntimeAuthRepair.adminKeyPreflight: /api/admin/test-config with configured admin key now returns 200.
postFailureRuntimeAuthRepair.apiWebHealth: healthy after Web restart with inherited .env.local values

replacementCanaryDecision.consentSummary: Steer-Co reviewer consented to one replacement HJ75 canary after committing this failure/provenance record because the failed job did not execute the analyzer and treating it as HJ75 evidence would corrupt provenance.
conditions: Count the failed job as budget-consuming but analytically invalid.
Re-verify Web/API health, runner auth, admin auth, clean git status, and runtime commit before replacement submission.
Run exactly one replacement canary; if it fails before analyzer execution again or provenance is missing, stop for Captain.
